display_text: Terrorblade Aghanim's Scepter: Terror Wave forces enemy heroes to become Feared and grants Metamorphosis for a short time. This upgrade counters enemy teamfight coordination and initiation by disrupting enemy positioning and providing Terrorblade with a temporary power spike in the middle of a fight.
search_text: Terrorblade Aghanim Scepter Fear disrupt teamfight initiation ultimate upgrade

display_text: Terrorblade Aghanim's Shard: Demon Zeal sacrifices HP to provide Terrorblade and illusions bonus movement, HP regen, and attack speed. This upgrade counters sustain issues by boosting Terrorblade's durability and mobility, allowing him to kite enemies and maintain map presence, especially when pushing lanes or defending objectives.
search_text: Terrorblade Aghanim Shard sustain mobility HP regen attack speed illusions kiting
